items.rationale: Sees ZK/proof performance breakthroughs (Lasso & Jolt) as a major unlock and repeatedly flags ZK advances as 'a big, big deal'; heavily represented in his CSX cohorts.
items.age_note: Spans 2023-08 to 2024; theme reinforced through 2024 CSX cohorts, so current.

citations.quote: Get ready for some mind blowing improvements in SNARK performance with the release of Lasso & Jolt.
Translation for folks who aren't fluent in the world of ZK- this is a big, big deal.

items.rationale: Views the steady drumbeat of L2 throughput gains and fee reduction (incl. EIP-4844) as a core primitive snapping into place that will accelerate developer experimentation.

citations.quote: Continued drumbeat of L2 progress in terms of reducing Ethereum transaction fees and increasing throughput

items.rationale: Identifies reduced new-user onboarding friction via embedded wallets as a key accelerant for adoption, naming Privy and Dynamic.

citations.quote: Reduced new user onboarding friction through embedded wallets- @privy, @dynamic_xyz

items.rationale: Excited by increasingly robust alt-DA capabilities and EigenLayer's vision as next-level infrastructure he wants to partner with.

citations.quote: Increasingly robust AltDA capabilites on the horizon- @eigencloud, @CelestiaOrg
What @eigencloud and @sreeramkannan are building and envisioning is truly next level. Beyond excited

items.rationale: Highlights super-simple app development via Farcaster Frames and repeatedly cites Farcaster's traction/growth as a standout consumer-crypto story.

citations.quote: Super simple (and fun!) app development- @farcaster_xyz Frames
it would have been almost impossible to predict the traction & growth of @farcaster during the intervening 12 months

items.rationale: His most recent market take: stablecoins as the cheapest way to move a dollar that can reset payments market structure, creating openings for incumbents and startups.
items.age_note: Most recent substantive market statement (2024-11-14); weighted heavily.

citations.quote: Stablecoins are the cheapest way to send a dollar. Stablecoins can reset the market structure in the payments industry

items.rationale: Repeatedly energized by permissionless/distributed AI training and compute; his Fall 2024 cohort skews heavily to AI-on-crypto (inference markets, agent payments, verifiable AI).

citations.quote: @GensynAI blew our minds with their vision of the future of distributed AI/ML... 'The substrate on which machines train and exist has to be permissionless.'
building on every level of the crypto stack, including AI, DeFi, infrastructure, and consumer applications

items.rationale: Optimistic that the post-election environment brings clearer rules that shut out bad actors and let legitimate projects flourish; long bullish on UK as a regulatory leader.
items.age_note: Reverses earlier framing of regulation as a navigation challenge/risk; most recent (2024-11-10) view is clearly optimistic.

citations.quote: We're optimistic that with clearer rules, it will make it easier to identify and shut down bad actors and allow well-meaning projects to take off.
we believe the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation.

items.rationale: Personally enjoys and backs onchain games and composable onchain art/game primitives, repeatedly praising founders building in the space.
items.age_note: Strongest signal 2023-09 (Proof of Play); restated via 2024 cohort companies (magicblock, dotdotfan), so persisted not stale.

citations.quote: Playing @PirateNationNFT over the last few months has been a delight... Delighted that @a16zcrypto is leading the @ProofOfPlay seed round!
@dotdotfan showcases the power of onchain composability, turning colors into building blocks for creating onchain art and casual games

items.rationale: Flags that navigating the policy landscape and avoiding bad legal/deal structures is a recurring hazard founders must actively manage — framed as a manageable risk rather than a market-killer, and softening post-election.
items.age_note: Concern tone present mid-2024; partly relieved by his 2024-11-10 optimism on clearer post-election rules.

citations.quote: As a founder, one of the best things you can do is have a holistic understanding of where the risks apply in your business.
A poorly structured term sheets can haunt your startup for its entire existence.

risk_regime.rationale: Consistently energized and optimistic: sees core crypto primitives (L2s, ZK, wallets, DA, stablecoins, AI-crypto) maturing simultaneously the way prior platform shifts accelerated, and is bullish on post-election regulatory clarity. Tone is overwhelmingly excited with no material bearish market calls.

notes: Rosenthal is an operator/accelerator lead (Crypto Startup School/CSX), so much of his corpus is founder-coaching and ecosystem cheerleading rather than token/market calls — he names no specific tokens to be long or short, hence empty token arrays. His sharpest dated market thesis is the 2024-02-09 'crypto primitives snapping into focus' thread (L2s, embedded wallets, AltDA, Farcaster Frames), which he frames as analogous to Web1/Web2 platform inflections. Most recent substantive market view (2024-11-14 stablecoins) and 2024-11-10 regulatory optimism are weighted highest. Concerns are thin and mostly operational/founder-risk rather than sector bearishness; the one regulatory concern is partially reversed by his post-election optimism.
